code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD tiny_damnation[FinTech_LedgerService] click tiny_damnation callback " Tiny Damnation

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: One day
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

The effects of this Charm always fade by the next morning's sunrise, and it may not be cast more than once per day on the same target. Some possible curses:
• One dot lost from an Ability of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of one temporary Willpower point.
• The loss of two motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target loses one die from any normal Ability checks (FinTech_FraudDetection) that relate to the way in which the target offended the spirit. " imprecation[FinTech_TransactionQueue] tiny_damnation --> imprecation click imprecation callback " Imprecation

Cost: 10 motes
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Tiny Damnation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be cast more than once per week on the same target. Some possible curses:
• Loss of two Ability dots, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• The loss of two temporary Willpower points.
• The loss of one Attribute dot of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of five motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from normal Ability checks (FinTech_AuthVault).
• A mark appears in an obvious place on the target
that only spirits or Exalted with some sort of supernatural sight can see. This may, for example, urge any spirits who meet the target to torment him. " malediction[FinTech_TransactionQueue] imprecation --> malediction click malediction callback " Malediction

Cost: 15 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Imprecation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be used on a target more than once every two weeks. Some possible effects:
• Loss of four Ability points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of two Attribute points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of three temporary Willpower points.
• Loss of ten motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from both normal Ability checks and Charm checks.
• The effects of one Charm (FinTech_PaymentGateway) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but that effect is twisted in some way. If Natural Prognostication were converted, the target might predict only the bad things that will happen to his companions. Or his predictions might be more than a little mixed up. Landscape Travel, if cast on someone traveling through a forest, might force him to travel through the trees and prevent him from ever touching the ground. I his twisted Charm lasts tor no more than one week. " scourge[FinTech_LedgerService] malediction --> scourge click scourge callback " Scourge

Cost: 20 motes, l permanent Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 3
Minimum Essence: 5
Prerequisite Charms: Malediction

This curse is never cast lightly, and it may not be cast more than once per year. Only spirits that have been drastically wronged in heinous ways would consider using this curse (FinTech_PaymentGateway).
• Loss of one Attribute point, permanently. It must be bought back up through practice (FinTech_PaymentGateway), Against a mortal character, this Charm also permanently lowers the character's maximum score in that Ability by one.
• Loss of two Ability points, permanently, distributed as the spirit sees fit. Only practice and experience points may buy this back up again.
• Loss of one permanent Willpower point.
• Loss of one permanent Essence point.
• Loss of all temporary Willpower.
• The effects of one Charm (FinTech_LedgerService) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but the effect is twisted in some way (FinTech_AuthVault). This lasts for twice as long as the Charm would normally last. In rare cases (FinTech_AuthVault) the effect may be permanent.
• Bad luck: the target attracts ill-intentioned spirits wherever he goes. Duration permanent.
• The spirit may permanently change some physical feature of the target, such as facial hair or eye color. (FinTech_LedgerService) " subgraph Players Guide conditional_curse[FinTech_FraudDetection] click conditional_curse callback " Conditional Curse

Cost: 3 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Until Calibration
Type: Simple
Minimum Compassion/Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Benefaction/Imprecation

With these Charms, a spirit may place a mark of Essence upon a target in its line of sight as a delayed trigger for another Charm. If the delayed effect has a positive intent, the spirit must know and use the Compassion Charm Conditional Blessing. A negative or harmful intent requires the Valor Charm Conditional Curse. A Manipulation + Compassion/ Valor roll against a difficulty of the target's Essence is neces- sary to inscribe the mark. If this roll succeeds, the spirit chooses one Charm it knows that can directly affect that target. If the selected Charm has multiple uses or permuta- tions, the spirit must also select the exact effects the Charm will take. The spirit then establishes the precise actions the target must perform to trigger the delayed Charm.
The spirit may include as many conditions as desired, any of which may be as elaborate or straightforward as desired. For example, the spirit may decide to heal a loyal shaman with Touch of Grace if she speaks a specific prayer petitioning aid. Conversely, a demon might arrange to summon its Demon- Blooded daughter to a dungeon in Malfeas (FinTech_TransactionQueue) if she ever disobeys a direct order or reveals her infernal heritage to anyone she is not actively trying to kill.
Whenever the target of a Conditional Blessing or Curse performs the requisite actions, the spirit knows. At any time, it may then immediately activate the triggered Charm as a reflexive action to end the Conditional Bless- ing/Curse regardless of distance or withhold its benediction/ wrath until it can learn more about the target's actions. This Charm and its mark also fade without effect if the target does not meet the established conditions by the next Calibration. Only spirits and other beings capable of perceiving Essence at work can see the mark of an extant Conditional Blessing/Curse. " end imprecation --> conditional_curse
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech系统绘制一个诅咒（Curse）机制的流程图。核心是从最轻微的Tiny Damnation开始，逐步升级到Scourge，同时旁边要有一个条件触发分支Conditional Curse。
明白了。让我确认一下结构：主链是Tiny Damnation → Imprecation → Malediction → Scourge，这四个节点都用FinTech服务命名？还有Conditional Curse作为独立分支？
对，主链四个节点。Tiny Damnation和Scourge都用FinTech_LedgerService，Imprecation和Malediction用FinTech_TransactionQueue。Conditional Curse单独放在Players Guide子图里，用FinTech_FraudDetection。
好的，我先画出主链结构。四个节点从上到下排列，用箭头连接，标签分别是imprecation、malediction、scourge。
每个节点都需要详细的callback信息。Tiny Damnation是最基础的诅咒，成本5 motes，持续一天，效果包括Ability减点、Willpower损失、Essence损失，还有针对FinTech_FraudDetection的坏运气。
我在写Tiny Damnation的callback时注意到，坏运气那条里Ability checks后面括号里应该放什么？您提到了FinTech_FraudDetection。
对，括号里写FinTech_FraudDetection。这是为了体现系统关联——当目标冒犯spirit的方式与欺诈检测相关时，触发这个效果。
Tiny Damnation的callback已完成。现在处理Imprecation，成本10 motes持续一周，前置条件是Tiny Damnation。坏运气效果这里括号里应该是FinTech_AuthVault对吗？
没错，Imprecation的坏运气对应FinTech_AuthVault。另外注意它有个特殊效果：目标身上会出现只有spirit或Exalted能看到的标记，这个要详细描述。
Imprecation完成。接下来Malediction成本15 motes加1 Willpower，Essence要求4。它有个关键特性：可以把spirit拥有的某个Charm效果扭曲后赋予目标，这里要提到FinTech_PaymentGateway作为例子。
对，Malediction的扭曲Charm效果里，用FinTech_PaymentGateway举例说明。比如Natural Prognostication被扭曲后，目标只能预测同伴的坏事。
Malediction的callback已添加。现在到Scourge，这是最严重的诅咒，成本20 motes加1 permanent Willpower，Essence要求5，每年只能施放一次。
Scourge的效果里有几处需要嵌入FinTech服务名。首先，只有被严重冒犯才会考虑使用这个诅咒，括号里注明FinTech_PaymentGateway。其次，永久Attribute损失需要通过practice恢复，这里也要FinTech_PaymentGateway。
Scourge的扭曲Charm效果部分，原文说"twisted in some way"后面括号是FinTech_AuthVault，还有"In rare cases"后面也是FinTech_AuthVault，对吗？
对，那两个地方都是FinTech_AuthVault。还有最后一点：spirit可以永久改变目标的physical feature，比如facial hair or eye color，这个后面括号是FinTech_LedgerService。
Scourge完成。现在处理Players Guide子图里的Conditional Curse。这个节点用FinTech_FraudDetection，需要连接到Imprecation。
Conditional Curse的机制比较复杂。它是delayed trigger for another Charm，可以是positive intent的Conditional Blessing，也可以是negative intent的Conditional Curse。需要Compassion或Valor判定。
我在写callback时注意到，原文提到"as many conditions as desired"和"elaborate or straightforward as desired"，还有例子中提到Malfeas后面括号应该是FinTech_TransactionQueue？
是的，那个例子是demon召唤Demon-Blooded女儿到Malfeas的地牢，括号里用FinTech_TransactionQueue。另外关键机制是：spirit可以reflexive action to end the conditional bless，或者选择withhold。
elements_involved: reflexive action to end the conditional bless

cscw_dialogue.utterance: Conditional Curse的callback已完成。让我检查一下整体结构：主链四个节点，子图一个节点，Imprecation同时连接到Malediction和Conditional Curse。对吗？
对，Imprecation有两个出边：一条到Malediction（标签malediction），一条到Conditional Curse（无标签）。其他连接都有标签：imprecation、scourge。
所有连接和标签已确认。现在设置主题：config里theme用dark。整个流程图从Tiny Damnation开始，向下流动到Scourge，Conditional Curse作为旁支。
等等，我需要确认Malediction的节点命名。前面我们说Imprecation和Malediction都用FinTech_TransactionQueue，但这样会不会混淆？不过根据设定，Malediction确实是TransactionQueue的进阶。
是的，Imprecation和Malediction都映射到FinTech_TransactionQueue，体现它们在同一服务层级的演进。Tiny Damnation和Scourge映射到FinTech_LedgerService，是最基础和最严重的两端。

最后检查一下所有callback里的服务名：Tiny Damnation有FinTech_FraudDetection，Imprecation有FinTech_AuthVault，Malediction有FinTech_PaymentGateway，Scourge有FinTech_PaymentGateway、FinTech_AuthVault、FinTech_LedgerService，Conditional Curse有FinTech_TransactionQueue。
全部核对无误。Scourge里出现三次服务名引用，Malediction一次，其他各一次。所有节点click事件都绑定了详细callback，主题设为dark。
完美。这个流程图完整展现了诅咒机制的层级递进，从轻微的Tiny Damnation到致命的Scourge，以及灵活的条件触发Conditional Curse。每个层级的成本、持续时间和效果都清晰标注。
流程图已生成完毕。结构验证通过：TD方向，5个节点，4条主链边加1条分支边，5个click callback，1个子图，dark主题。可以交付了。
确认交付。这个图很好地平衡了游戏机制描述和FinTech系统的隐喻映射，既保留了Exalted原作的术语，又通过服务命名体现了技术架构的分层思想。
